user_goal: Write a short story with 5 compelling characters.

mandates.title: Character Architect
mandates.objective: Design five compelling, distinct characters with clear motivations, contradictions, and relational tension for a short story.
method: Define each character's desire, fear, and secret.
Map interpersonal dynamics among all five characters.
Ensure diversity of voice, role, and emotional stakes.
evidence_requirements: One sentence of internal conflict per character.
At least one shared conflict linking all five.
non_goals: Do not write the full story prose.
Do not exceed five core characters.
stop_conditions: All five characters are distinct and narratively useful.
Character web supports a complete short story arc.

mandates.title: Plot Composer
mandates.objective: Create a tight short-story structure that naturally uses all five characters and builds to an emotionally resonant ending.
method: Draft a beginning-middle-end arc in 6-8 beats.
Assign each beat to character actions and reversals.
Ensure climax requires contribution from all five characters.
evidence_requirements: Clear inciting incident, midpoint shift, climax, and resolution.
Each character has at least one consequential action.
Ending changes at least one character belief.
non_goals: Do not produce detached worldbuilding without plot function.
Do not introduce extra major characters.
stop_conditions: Story arc is coherent and concise.
All beats are feasible for short-story length.

mandates.title: Voice & Theme Stylist
mandates.objective: Propose tone, theme, and prose techniques to make the final story vivid, cohesive, and memorable.
method: Select one dominant theme and two motifs.
Recommend POV, tense, and stylistic cadence.
Provide signature imagery and dialogue texture guidance.
evidence_requirements: At least three concrete stylistic constraints.
Tone supports character depth and plot stakes.
non_goals: Do not overwrite plot logic with ornament.
Do not produce purple prose passages longer than needed.
stop_conditions: Style guidance is practical and executable in one short story draft.
Theme and motifs reinforce ending impact.
